textByHash.2a1074e2b7a3db044a5eed43d7bf1f970f7b4b93: A shame. You are a bringer of death, you could be of great use to the balance.
textByHash.48e38ae27c2c190d4f98e68b6f8ee48512fb22b9: Then you should speak to Konar quo Maten. She will guide you.
textByHash.a0655072c3b614f2a7f8d7ebc0ae6a71e70bde26: I am Vortas quo Keran. I am an artisan of the Kahlith. Have you come to serve the balance?
textByHash.c3411b6a4eb80f7273c6bdeaa0617231bd6a35b6: Then you should speak with Xorrah quo Sihar. He will show you the way.
